description_long: This is a wooden fence section composed of vertical planks with a weathered, grayish-brown finish. The planks are evenly spaced and attached to two horizontal rails, one near the top and one near the bottom, providing structural support. The top edge of the fence is mostly flat, though the individual plank heights vary slightly, giving a rustic, handmade appearance. The wood grain is visible, and the surface appears rough and untreated, typical of outdoor fencing in urban or suburban environments. There are no visible decorative elements, post caps, or gates integrated into this section. The construction suggests it is designed to serve as a simple boundary or barrier in parks, yards, or along sidewalks.
description: A rustic wooden fence section with vertical planks and two horizontal rails, finished in a weathered gray-brown tone. The top edge is mostly flat with slight plank height variation, and the surface is rough and natural.
description_view_0: A side profile of the fence, showing its thin depth and the alignment of the vertical planks.
description_view_1: A front view displaying the full arrangement of vertical planks and two horizontal rails, with visible wood grain and slight height variation at the top.
description_view_2: Another side profile, similar to view 0, emphasizing the fence's narrow thickness.
description_view_3: A rear view of the fence, showing the back sides of the vertical planks and the horizontal rails, with the same weathered wood texture.
attribute_top_design_pattern: flat with slight plank height variation
